title: Kemanaa
description: A tourism companion for exploring local places, food, and Indonesian souvenirs. At PT Indonesia Kreasi Mandiri I built both the mobile app and the web platform end to end.

contributions.title: Mobile app
contributions.text: built the Flutter client with Firebase and SQLite.

contributions.title: Web platform
contributions.text: developed kemanaa.com with PHP, MySQL, Bootstrap, and jQuery.
Integrated REST APIs and JSON, produced SDLC artifacts (flowcharts, ER diagrams), and handled releases to the Play Store and App Store.
